quicksight.dataset.physicaltable.CfnAbou: A view of a data source that contains information about the shape of the data in the underlying source. This is a variant type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be non-null.

quicksight.dataset.physicaltable.CustomS.Description: A physical table type built from the results of the custom SQL query.

quicksight.dataset.physicaltable.Relatio.Description: A physical table type for relational data sources.

quicksight.dataset.physicaltable.S3Sourc.Description: A physical table type for as S3 data source.
